data.title: Microservices Architecture
data.description: Netflix uses a microservices architecture to enhance scalability and manageability of its services.
data.technical_spec: Distributed system with independently deployable services.

data.title: Content Delivery Network (CDN)
data.description: Netflix employs its own CDN named Open Connect to deliver streaming content efficiently.
data.technical_spec: Strategically placed caching servers to optimize streaming quality.

data.title: Serverless Infrastructure
data.description: Utilizes AWS Lambda and other cloud services for dynamic scaling and processing video workloads.
data.technical_spec: AWS Fargate and Lambda functions for event-driven and scalable computations.

data.title: Data Pipeline and Storage
data.description: Utilizes data pipelines for processing user and viewing data to drive personalization and recommendations.
data.technical_spec: Apache Kafka, Amazon S3, and Hadoop for data processing and storage.

data.title: Resilient Architecture with Chaos Engineering
data.description: Employs chaos engineering practices to ensure the system is resilient and fault-tolerant.
data.technical_spec: Simian Army tools for stress testing and fault injection.
